# Typescript

Parent: [Ditto Polyglot](../README.md)

Open-source package support files for the Typescript module.

## Key Files

- `express.ts`: Source file in this module.
- `flask.ts`: Source file in this module.
- `framework_compiler.ts`: Source file in this module.
- `framework_recognizer.ts`: Source file in this module.
- `gin.ts`: Source file in this module.
- `hono.ts`: Source file in this module.
- `sinatra.ts`: Source file in this module.

## Usage

Use this README as the local map for this directory. Keep implementation details near the owning source files, and update this document when the directory contract changes.

## Verification

Run the closest package or app-level check through the repository-owned `a0` or `monster` target after changing behavior in this directory.
